Owolabi Legunsen
Assistant Professor
442A Gates Hall
Department of Computer Science
Cornell University
Ithaca, NY 14850, USA
Email: legunsen@cornell.edu
  • Teaching
    • Runtime Verification: Fall'20, Spring'22, Spring'23, Spring'24, Spring'25, Spring'26
    • Software Testing: Spring'21, Fall'21, Fall'22, Fall'23, Fall'25
    • Object-Oriented Programming and Data Structures: Fall'24
  • CV
  • Scholar
  • DBLP
I am broadly interested in research on Software Engineering, with a focus on Software Testing and Runtime Verification.
Publications
  1. Block Tests
    Kevin Guan, Pengyue Jiang, Milos Gligoric, and Owolabi Legunsen
    ACM SIGPLAN International Conference on Systems, Programming, Languages and Applications
    (OOPSLA 2026), pages to-appear, Oakland, CA, October 2026.

  2. A Closer Look at the Use of Reinforcement Learning for Speeding Up Runtime Verification of Software Tests (Experience Paper)
    Shinhae Kim, Saikat Dutta, and Owolabi Legunsen
    ACM SIGSOFT International Symposium on Software Testing and Analysis
    (ISSTA 2026), pages to-appear, Oakland, CA, October 2026.

  3. PyMOP: A Runtime Verification Tool for Python
    Zhuohang Shen, Mohammed Yaseen, Kevin Guan, Denini Silva, Marcelo d'Amorim, and Owolabi Legunsen
    34th ACM International Conference on the Foundations of Software Engineering, Tool Demonstrations Track
    (FSE Demo 2026), pages to-appear, Montreal, Canada, July 2026.

  4. Automated Inline-Test Generation without Relying on Method-Level Unit Tests
    Pengyue Jiang, Yu Liu, Ana Guo, Milos Gligoric, and Owolabi Legunsen
    European Conference on Object-Oriented Programming
    (ECOOP 2026), pages to-appear, Brussels, Belgium, June-July 2026.

  5. Fine-Grained Analyses for Evolution-Aware Runtime Verification
    Pengyue Jiang, Kevin Guan, Mahdi Khosravi, Moustafa Ismail, Marcelo d'Amorim, and Owolabi Legunsen
    48th IEEE/ACM International Conference on Software Engineering
    (ICSE 2026), pages to-appear, Rio de Janeiro, Brazil, April 2026.

  6. Valg: A Fast Reinforcement Learning Based Runtime Verification Tool for Java
    Shinhae Kim, Saikat Dutta, and Owolabi Legunsen
    48th IEEE/ACM International Conference on Software Engineering, Tool Demonstrations Track
    (ICSE Demo 2026), pages to-appear, Rio de Janeiro, Brazil, April 2026.

  7. Learning Compiler Fuzzing Mutators from Historical Bugs
    Lingjun Liu, Feiran Qin, Owolabi Legunsen, and Marcelo d'Amorim
    International Conference on Mining Software Repositories
    (MSR 2026), pages to-appear, Rio de Janeiro, Brazil, April 2026.

  8. Faster Runtime Verification during Testing via Feedback-Guided Selective Monitoring
    Shinhae Kim, Saikat Dutta, and Owolabi Legunsen
    IEEE/ACM International Conference on Automated Software Engineering
    (ASE 2025), pages to-appear, Seoul, Korea, November 2025.
    (This paper won an ACM SIGSOFT Distinguished Paper Award)
